com.nexacro.java.xapi.data

Class ColumnHeader

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.ColumnHeader
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ConstantColumnHeader

    public class ColumnHeader
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Cloneable, java.io.Serializable

    Saves properties for DataSet column.

    Propeties for column are as below.

    Property Variable Data Type Valid Value
    Identifier name String Only character string in DataSet other then null and “”.null
    Column Type type int Ordinary column(TYPE_NORMAL) and column with constant value(TYPE_CONSTANT)
    Ordinary column(TYPE_NORMAL) and column with constant value(TYPE_CONSTANT) dataType int Refer to constant defined inDataTypes
    Data Size dataSize int Integer Value
    Value value Object Valid only inConstantColumnHeader
    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int TYPE_CONSTANT
      Indicates column with constant value(value).
      static int TYPE_NORMAL
      Indicates ordinary column.
